name: proofbridge-liner
description: Bayesian Safety Kernel for tokenised RWA — ProofBridge Liner

scripts.build:docs: pandoc docs/whitepaper.md --pdf-engine=xelatex -V geometry:margin=1in -V fontsize=11pt -V mainfont='Noto Serif' -V monofont='JetBrains Mono' -o docs/whitepaper.pdf && pandoc docs/deck.md -V geometry:margin=0.75in -V fontsize=14pt -V mainfont='Orbitron' -V monofont='JetBrains Mono' -o docs/deck.pdf

author: Vaguely Vanity LLC
